status_notes: Japanese only — no English translation located as of 2026-07-16.
official_name: Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications, Japan
notes: See also registry/regulation/jp/go/soumu.json (Telecommunications Business Act) for the regulation-type file under this same namespace.

match_nodes.description: Guideline on Technical Measures for Ensuring AI Security — Japan's first dedicated technical AI-security guideline

data.official_name: Guideline on Technical Measures for Ensuring AI Security
data.notes: Developed by MIC's AI Security Subcommittee starting September 2025. Draft published December 5, 2025; public comment ran December 26, 2025 - January 29, 2026 (52 comments received); subsequently finalized (status as of 2026-07-16: finalized, not still draft, superseding the earlier 'draft' framing). Focuses on concrete technical measures AI developers/operators should implement against AI-specific cybersecurity threats: unauthorized/malicious output generation, system malfunction, and confidential-information leakage via manipulation of AI systems. Distinct from the broader AI Guidelines for Business (secid:control/meti.go.jp/ai-business-guidelines) in being technical/security-specific rather than general AI-governance principles. Japanese-only; no English translation located.
